question: Will the WTI Crude Oil Spot Price be above $98.50 on May 28, 2026?
reason: WTI Crude Oil prices have been below $98.50 recently and are projected to remain below that threshold.
evidence: As of May 27, 2026, WTI Crude Oil is trading at $91.90 per barrel.
Analysts forecast WTI Crude Oil prices to average around $94.21 in June 2026.
The U.S. Energy Information Administration projects WTI Crude Oil prices to average $94 per barrel in July 2026.
